mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_id, work_start_time, work_end_time, late_grace_minutes, early_leave_grace_minutes, status, create_time, update_time FROM attendance_rule WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.unit_id, su.unit_name, a.work_start_time, a.work_end_time, a.late_grace_minutes, a.early_leave_grace_minutes, a.status, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM attendance_rule a LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = a.unit_id WHERE a.unit_id = #{unitId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_rule SET work_start_time = #{workStartTime}, work_end_time = #{workEndTime}, late_grace_minutes = #{lateGraceMinutes}, early_leave_grace_minutes = #{earlyLeaveGraceMinutes}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
